{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Underlord weapon
| introduced = Ghostwater
}}

== Ghostwater ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The axe used by [[Harmony]] is an [[Underlord weapon]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c18">''Ghostwater'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Uncrowned ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|An [[Underlord weapon]] is noted to produce better results than an unsuitable [[Archlord weapon]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15">''Uncrowned'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|"...although allow me to caution you that an Underlord weapon suited for you will produce far better results than an unsuitable Archlord weapon."<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
[[Category:Terminology]]
